arts.ttl: Report: Enzo Maresca is personally 'putting pressure' on Chelsea's board to sign striker who's like Erling Haaland
Everton vs Manchester City: Ederson out but Foden and Akanji could play
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has confirmed goalkeeper Ederson will miss Manchester City's final trip to Goodison Park but Phil Foden and Manuel Akanji are pushing to return against Everton. "Phil came back on Thursday and today will be the second training session since the action from Old Trafford," Guardiola said.

arts.ttl: Manchester United join Manchester City in race to sign Monaco’s €70m-rated Maghnes Akliouche
arts.sum: Manchester United have joined Manchester City in the race to sign AS Monaco forward Maghnes Akliouche (23), who is expected to leave his formative club in the summer, according to…

arts.ttl: Thierry Henry Named Man City Star as 'Cleverest Player I've Ever Seen'
arts.sum: Thierry Henry made a surprise choice when naming the cleverest football player he has ever seen.

arts.ttl: Everton vs Man City Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Everton, currently sitting in 13th, host Man City, who are aiming to climb into the Champions League places, in their Premier League clash at Goodison Park on Saturday, April 19th, with kick-off sched...

arts.ttl: Man City could sell Kyle Walker for under £1m as AC Milan's transfer 'price range' revealed
arts.sum: Manchester City could reportedly lose a long-serving club legend for a mere £1.7m in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man City frontrunners to sign Nottingham Forest star Morgan Gibbs-White ahead of rivals, while another star is their 'dream' recruit as club plot summer rebuild
arts.sum: Manchester City are considered frontrunners in the pursuit of England international Morgan Gibbs-White this summer.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Man City's summer plans revealed as Doku and Silva face the axe
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Man City's summer plans revealed as Doku and Silva face the axe FootballTransfers understands that Manchester City are planning a major summer clearout, with several high-profile players potentially on the chopping block.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Open: Carlos Alcaraz beats Alex de Minaur to book semi-final place at ATP Tour 500 event
arts.sum: A two-time winner of the ATP Tour 500 event in 2022 and 2023, Spaniard Alcaraz will face 20-year-old Frenchman Arthur Fils for a place in the final, after Greece's Stefanos Tsitsipas was forced to retire from their semi-final later on Friday at 2-0 down in the first set. Carlos Alcaraz is through to the semi-finals of the Barcelona Open after defeating Australia's Alex de Minaur in straight sets 7-5 6-3.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Neymar BACK to Barcelona, De Bruyne NEGOTIATIONS, Ancelotti SACK
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Neymar BACK to Barcelona, De Bruyne NEGOTIATIONS, Ancelotti SACK Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including the latest on Neymar, Kevin de Bruyne and Carlo Ancelotti.
